_readme: Per-package save-backup overrides for VR CyberDeck. Games listed here use a custom backup/restore method instead of the default (snapshot of /sdcard/Android/data/<pkg>). VR CyberDeck fetches this file from GitHub before every backup/restore, caches it locally, and falls back to the default method for any package not listed. To add a game: add an entry under `profiles` keyed by its package name. Fields per profile: `appLabel` (string, display only); `paths` (string[], device paths to snapshot — defaults to ['/sdcard/Android/data/<pkg>'], first entry is primary); `includeInternalData` (bool, also attempt a best-effort run-as capture of /data/data/<pkg> — only works on debuggable builds); `notes` (string, shown in the app UI and failure reports).

com.fyian.TheThrillOfTheFight.notes: Career progression is stored in PlayerPrefs (private internal shared_prefs), not external storage. The external Android/data tree is mostly cache. Internal capture is best-effort and only succeeds on debuggable builds; retail builds need root for a full restore.
